EmailTemplate.description: Email Template for future payment transaction notification
EmailTemplate.name: Payment Processor Future Payment Notification
EmailTemplate.subject: Payment Reminder
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
This is just to remind you that your next payment on account {!Payment_Transaction__c.Product__c} will occur on {!Payment_Transaction__c.Next_Payment_Date__c}.
We look forward to receiving your payment. If you have any questions regarding your account, please contact us toll-free at 1-844-827-9221, or collections@canaccede.com. Regards,
Canaccede International Management Ltd.
Please click here to update your email preferences.
If you wish to unsubscribe from receiving all further commercial electronic messages from MyAccount, please click here or go to the following web address https://CFGmyaccount.ca/unsubscribe/ . You can also email us at myaccountmanagement@canaccede.ca. It is your responsibility to always login to check the status of your account. You may still receive some electronic messages where permitted by law.
